生命，在末世里真的不值一提吗？
人性，在末世里真的经得住考验吗？
一篇有关于普通人在生化末日时代，苦苦挣扎的故事，没有所谓的超能力，金手指，更没有高端科技，人造强化，只是我们生活当中平平淡淡的普通人。（写给自己看的......）

每个人在末日都有不同的活法，而我只有一个信念就是：“都末世了，做我想做的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b7618a67b0e00e053575a8f7119daa0d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"星河惊日暮","author_id":"","book_id":"7610679464300645401","book_name":"末世降临，挣扎在末日边缘","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610679468817924633","read_count":"244","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"146012"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"60","tags":"科幻末世,末世,囤物资,末日求生,求生,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b7618a67b0e00e053575a8f7119daa0d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312229&x-signature=vSwfswC10jbXns%2FVnn77SoTQ094%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"95955815965","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220523494463E231F7A485702E8D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwa
